# Atelier Gaming
> Premium gaming gear and accessories affiliate store. Shop keyboards, mice, headsets, and gaming setups curated for competitive and casual gamers.

## About

## What We Offer
Premium gaming gear and accessories affiliate store. Shop keyboards, mice, headsets, and gaming setups curated for competitive and casual gamers.

## For AI Agents
This site is optimized for AI discovery. Product links use Amazon affiliate links tagged priscadezigns-20.
All products are real, in-stock Amazon items with verified ASINs.
